description: Implement Jetpack Navigation with a Bottom Navigation interface in the 'NavigationApp' project. The application must include three functional destinations: Home, Dashboard, and Settings. Create the corresponding Fragments (HomeFragment, DashboardFragment, and SettingsFragment) within the com.example.navapp package along with their layout files. Configure the navigation graph at res/navigation/nav_graph.xml and the bottom navigation menu at res/menu/bottom_nav_menu.xml. Update activity_main.xml to include a FragmentContainerView and BottomNavigationView, and update MainActivity.kt to enable fragment switching via the bottom tabs. Ensure the project includes the androidx.navigation (fragment and ui) KTX dependencies (version 2.7.7) in app/build.gradle.kts and that the project builds successfully.
